2137800.name: Hi-Score Recorder
2137800.description:
Hi-Score Recorder is a simple and intuitive program which allows you to keep track of all of you high scores from your favorite games. Find a new way to enjoy all of your favorite games.

Features:

- Add your own custom list of consoles and game titles
- Keep track of high scores, speed runs, CC, characters used, games beaten, and difficulties
- Add your own pictures for games and evidence of your scores
